headline: AXON Stock Set For Best Month In Over A Year – What’s The Trump Connection?
summary: Federal disclosures revealed that President Donald Trump acquired between $1 million and $5 million in shares in February, just weeks before ICE reportedly issued a $220 million request to purchase tasers.

headline: How Trump’s Axon investment could benefit from an ICE contract
summary: ICE announced that it was seeking a $220 million contract to more than quadruple its inventory two weeks after President Trump invested up to $5 million in top U.S. taser-maker Axon Enterprise. Experts say that only one company can meet the contract requirement outlined by ICE: Axon. CNBC’s Luke Fountain breaks it down.

raw.headline: How Trump’s Axon investment could benefit from an ICE contract
raw.summary: ICE announced that it was seeking a $220 million contract to more than quadruple its inventory two weeks after President Trump invested up to $5 million in top U.S. taser-maker Axon Enterprise.
